title: Racosperma crassiusculum

This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its fruit and flower structure. The plant was previously classified in the genus Acacia but was reclassified into the genus Racosperma. Racosperma crassiusculum is a member of the subfamily Mimosoideae. The exact classification may vary depending on the source and the current taxonomic understanding.
